title: citrus miaray
intro: Citrus miaray is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus family. It is native to tropical regions and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Citrus miaray can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and its essential oil is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
